name: Pina Colada Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the whipped topping according to the package directions and refrigerate.
2. To brown the coconut, place under the broiler or in a 350°F oven for 10-15 minutes, stirring frequently and watching carefully to avoid burning.
3. In a large bowl, beat together the cream cheese, powdered sugar, and pina colada mix until smooth.
4. Add the whipped topping and beat at high speed until well combined.
5. Fold in the pineapple and coconut mixture.
6. Chill the dessert for at least 2 hours before serving.
7. This can be served as a topping on whipped cream or placed in a graham cracker crust and served as a pie, serving 10 people.
